markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review post-launch SEO issues and define content next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GSC Cleanup:** The `robots.txt` file will be updated to disallow UTMs (after confirming they're tracked elsewhere) and 404 pages, which are causing crawl errors.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**Content Blocked:** 8 articles are ready for review, but publishing is blocked by the lack of Open Graph (OG) images.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [**New SEO Initiatives:** Vizcom will implement schema markup and alt text to improve search ranking and accessibility.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [**GA Data Gap:** A 3-day Google Analytics data gap (Jan 9–11) occurred post-launch, likely from agency work; tracking is now restored.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO & GSC Cleanup

  - [**Meta Description Fix:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [**Problem:** Webflow scraped the homepage's animated text, creating a garbled meta description.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [**Action:** Vizcom manually updated the description in Webflow and submitted the URL to Google Search Console (GSC).](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [**Follow-up:** Carly will check for an update by Friday and resubmit if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**GSC Crawl Errors:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
      - [**Problem:** GSC is reporting crawl errors for UTMs and 404 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
      - [**Action:** Vizcom will confirm if UTMs are tracked elsewhere. If so, Carly will update `robots.txt` to disallow crawling of URLs with a `?` (UTMs) and specific 404 pages (`/signup`, `/login`).](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**`robots.txt` Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [**Action:** Carly will review Vizcom's new `robots.txt` file to ensure it's correctly configured.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**URL Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Problem:** A `vizcom.com/resources/blog` structure was incorrectly implemented by the agency.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Resolution:** The structure was corrected to `vizcom.com/blog`, and unnecessary redirects were removed.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

### Content & Publishing

  - [**Open Graph (OG) Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [**Blocker:** 8 ready-to-review articles cannot be published without OG images.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Vizcom needs a consistent design language for both metadata (social sharing) and on-page thumbnails.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [**Action:** Carly will follow up with Jenny on the status of these images.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**New Topic Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [5 new drafts are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [Carly will audit the remaining topic list to prevent duplication and cannibalization before sending it to Vizcom for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

### New SEO Initiatives

  - [**Schema Markup:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Improves search ranking by making content easier for bots to read.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [**Action:** Carly will provide templates and recommendations for specific schema types (e.g., Organization for homepage, Article for blog posts).](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [**Alt Text:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Improves accessibility for users with disabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Action:** Vizcom will write descriptive alt text that avoids keyword stuffing.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [Follow up with Jenny on OG image status.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Check GSC for meta description update by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [Review `robots.txt` file.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [Audit new topic list and send to Vizcom for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [Prepare schema markup templates for next week's call.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [**Vizcom:**](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [Confirm UTM tracking location; inform Carly if GSC tracking is not needed.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [Review the 8 ready-to-publish articles.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [Approve the new topic list by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/wia2bBGfvRPnqVYoH39g3cMCPUNP_bts?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
